prompt: Build a family photo detail card that shows the date, who is in it, and a private caption that only I can edit.
Create a browsable family photo album view with filters for year and person.
Build a shared family photo wall module that everyone in the house can browse and react to.
Show one grocery item with quantity, store, and whether we already bought it.
Create the shared grocery list for this week and let us sort it by aisle or store.
Build a household dashboard with the shared calendar, grocery list, and chore chart visible together.
Create a private journal module for my personal entries that nobody else in the house can see.
Create a shared family photo album module that everyone in the house can add to.
Build a household home dashboard with shared family tools and separate private space for each person.
I've been using my recipe collection privately. Now I want new recipes to post automatically to my Telegram cooking group whenever I add one.
Build a local batch log for home brewing or winemaking where I can track brew date, recipe, style, gravity, packaging notes, and tasting notes.
Create a family recipe box where I can store dishes, ingredients, cooking notes, and a clean recipe card view for phone, tablet, or print.
Build a personal recipe organizer with browsing, editing, search, and a clean kitchen view for phone, tablet, or print.
Create a home garden reference and log where I can keep plant notes, care schedules, harvest dates, and seasonal reminders.
Build a local family tree tool where I can record relatives, relationships, dates, photos, and notes in one place.
Create a simple recipe browser where I can organize recipes by category and skill level and choose what to cook next.
Build a local recipe manager with list view, detail view, edit form, and a recipe card layout that works on screen or in print.
Create a local meal planner that schedules recipes across several days and generates a combined shopping list.
I want a simple local journal where I can write entries, search past entries, and browse them by date.
Build a weekly menu planner that helps me choose meals, track what I plan to cook, and share or print the plan for the kitchen.
Create a family vehicle maintenance log that tracks service history, costs, mileage, and reminders for recurring maintenance.
Build a recipe card editor with title, ingredients, steps, prep time, tags, and a kitchen-friendly reading layout.
Create a weekly meal-plan grid where I assign recipes to days, see leftovers, and generate a shopping summary.
Build a family photo detail view with date, people tags, caption, reactions, and privacy controls.
Create a reusable household chore card with assignee, due date, repeat schedule, and completion history.
Build a vehicle service entry form with date, mileage, work completed, shop, cost, and the next reminder target.
